sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: Jas is a villager who lives just outside Pelican Town . She's a young girl, and can often be found with her best friend Vincent .

sections.heading: Schedule
sections.content:
After the Beach Resort on Ginger Island is unlocked, Jas may randomly spend the day there. After leaving the Island at 6pm, Jas will immediately go home to bed. Jas never visits the Resort on Tuesdays, Wednesdays, Fridays, Festival days or her checkup day at Harvey's Clinic . Jas also never visits the Resort without an adult accompanying her.
Shown below are Jas' schedules prioritized highest to lowest. For example, if it is raining, that schedule overrides all others below it.

sections.heading: Relationships
sections.content: Jas lives with her aunt Marnie and her godfather Shane on her ranch outside town. She's often seen alongside her friend Vincent , who is the only resident of town close to her age. Penny takes time to teach both Vincent and Jas at the museum since there's no school nearby. Jas' parents both died by unknown causes.

sections.heading: Gifts
sections.content:
You can give Jas up to two gifts per week (plus one on 
her
birthday), which will raise or lower 
her friendship with you. Gifts on 
her
birthday ( 4 Summer ) will have 8× effect and show a unique dialogue. For loved, liked, or neutral gifts, Jas responds
For disliked or hated gifts, Jas responds

sections.heading: Love
sections.content:
Ancient Doll
Fairy Box
Stardrop Tea
Strange Doll (green) or Strange Doll (yellow)

sections.heading: Dislike
sections.content: * Note that the following are not considered Eggs for gifting purposes: Dinosaur Egg is an Artifact ; Frog Egg and Parrot Egg are considered Trinkets .

sections.heading: Hate
sections.content:
Any Alcoholic Beverage
Coffee or Triple Shot Espresso

sections.heading: Eight Hearts
sections.content: After reaching 8 hearts with both Jas and Vincent , enter Cindersap Forest during Spring on a sunny day between 6am and 5pm.

sections.heading: Trivia
sections.content:
- Ironically, Jas hates Clay but she may gift it to you at the Feast of the Winter Star .
- Gifting Jas Ice Cream at the Desert Festival raises friendship with her by 200 points. This can be done one time per player.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.3.27 : Added eight heart event.
- 1.4 : Now hates Mead, likes Honey & Jelly.
- 1.4.4 : Now hates Triple Shot Espresso.
- 1.6 : Added custom gift reactions. Added winter portraits. Now loves Ancient Doll, Strange Doll (green), and Strange Doll (yellow). Now likes all Milks.

“Wow, a birthday present! I love it!”
“A birthday present? Oh... I don't like this.”
“Oh, a little dolly! She's kind of dirty, but I'll give her a bath. Thanks!”
“Wow, it’s so pretty! And there’s a fairy inside? *giggle*... I can hear her singing. She’ll be my secret friend.”
“Are you sure? It smells so good! I'll only drink a thimbleful a day.”
“Oh, I like him! He'll fit right in with my other friends.”

Vincent will explain how to clean, Spring Onions, by removing insects. Jas insists that the insects not be killed after removing them from the onions. Afterward, the player gains, Spring Onion Mastery, , which permanently increases the sell price of Spring Onions by 5x.
